title: Selecting Dividend Aristocrats Using SCHD Methodology - Mounting A Comeback
text: I propose leveraging the stock selection criteria from the underlying index of SCHD to build a portfolio with a subset of Dividend Aristocrats. I am tracking two portfolios built using this process and comparing the results to NOBL and SCHD.

title: Genuine Parts (GPC) Partners Google Cloud to Revamp Platform
text: Genuine Parts (GPC) announces a collaboration with Google Cloud to support business transformation and elevate customer experience.

title: Dividend King Genuine Parts Company Upgraded On Profit Guidance
text: Genuine Parts Company (NYSE: GPC) is hosting an investor day event, and the pre-event press release already excites the analysts. The release reaffirmed the dividend king and its 2023 targets and gave a long-term forecast well above the Marketbeat.com consensus.

title: This Dividend King Upped Its Payout: Should You Buy It?
text: Genuine Parts produced double-digit revenue and earnings growth in the fourth quarter. The company pays a market-topping dividend.

title: Genuine Parts: Rising Demand For Replacement Parts Should Drive Growth
text: The increasing rate of longer and extended product life cycles has significantly boosted the demand for replacement parts and maintenance servicing worldwide. The company has reported net sales of $5.5 billion, a 15.0% YoY growth compared to $4.8 billion in Q4 FY21.

title: 3 Companies Boosting Their Dividends Even in This Economy
text: Credit card processor Mastercard stands to directly benefit from the higher spending that comes along with inflation. Travel is rebounding from its pandemic-driven lows, enabling Ryman Hospitality Properties to boost its payment to shareholders.

title: What Has Been 'Genuinely' Reliable Since President Truman In 1948?
text: As Genuine Parts keeps paying dividends, GPC stock test-drives a new buy zone, along with auto parts peers ORLY and AZO. The post What Has Been 'Genuinely' Reliable Since President Truman In 1948?
